meta.title: ImuChat Creators — Create, Share, Earn
meta.description: Join the ImuChat creator program. Monetize your content with 80% revenue share, AI tools and zero punitive algorithm.

home.heroSubtitle: The creator platform that puts you first. 80% revenue share, zero punitive algorithm, AI tools included.
home.pillar1Desc: Your fans support you directly in ImuCoins.
home.pillar2Desc: Exclusive content for your premium subscribers.
home.pillar3Desc: Sell your digital and physical creations.
home.pillar5Desc: Sell stickers, themes, effects and mini-apps.
home.toolsPreviewDesc: Video editor, AI filters, automatic subtitles and much more.
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of creators earning a living on ImuChat.

monetization.title: Monetization
monetization.subtitle: All the ways to earn a living on ImuChat.
monetization.simulatorDesc: Estimate your monthly revenue based on your audience.

tools.title: AI Creation Tools
tools.subtitle: Everything you need to create exceptional content.
tools.tool1Desc: Professional editing directly in the app. Cuts, transitions, effects.
tools.tool2Desc: Visual filters and effects generated by artificial intelligence.
tools.tool3Desc: Automatic transcription and subtitles in 40+ languages.
tools.tool4Desc: Translate your content to reach a global audience.
tools.tool5Desc: Library of animated stickers, AR effects and augmented reality.
tools.tool7Desc: Schedule your posts in advance with an editorial calendar.
tools.tool8Desc: Ready-to-use templates for all content formats.

imufeed.title: ImuFeed
imufeed.subtitle: The next-gen video feed — designed for creators, not algorithms.
imufeed.shortDesc: 15 seconds to 3 minutes. Vertical format optimized for mobile.
imufeed.longDesc: Up to 60 minutes. For tutorials, vlogs and in-depth content.
imufeed.storiesDesc: 24h ephemeral content. Stay connected to your audience daily.
imufeed.algoDesc: Based on your real interests, not sensationalism. Your subscribers see your content first.
imufeed.diff1Desc: Your content is always visible. Zero hidden penalties.
imufeed.diff2Desc: Your subscribers always see your new publications.
imufeed.diff3Desc: Tips and gifts directly in the feed.
imufeed.diff4Desc: Effects, stickers and filters inspired by Japanese culture.

live.title: Live Streaming
live.subtitle: Connect with your audience in real time. Stream, interact, monetize.
live.feature1Desc: Stream from your camera, screen or favorite game.
live.feature2Desc: Viewers send ImuCoins gifts live. Spectacular visual effects.
live.feature3Desc: Invite other creators to join your live stream.
live.feature4Desc: Featured messages from your fans for 1 to 1000 ImuCoins.
live.feature5Desc: Convert viewers into subscribers during the stream.
live.feature6Desc: Every live is automatically recorded and available as VOD.

analytics.title: Creator Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Understand your audience, optimize your content, maximize your revenue.
analytics.dashboardDesc: View all your metrics at a glance. Data updated every hour.
analytics.exportDesc: Export your data as CSV or PDF for your accounting.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Build a loyal and engaged community around your universe.
community.feature1Desc: Create spaces reserved for your premium subscribers.
community.feature2Desc: Involve your audience in your creative decisions.
community.feature4Desc: Organize exclusive events for your community.
community.feature5Desc: Participate in community competitions and challenges.
community.feature6Desc: Reward your most loyal fans with exclusive badges.
community.arenaDesc: Create tournaments, challenges and community events to engage your audience.

store.title: Creator Store
store.subtitle: Sell your creations directly to your community.
store.category1Desc: Your characters and expressions as animated stickers.
store.category2Desc: Customize the app with your colors and designs.
store.category3Desc: Unique emojis with your artistic style.
store.revenueDesc: One of the best commissions on the market.
store.publishDesc: Submit your creations, they'll be available within 24h after validation.

success.title: Success Stories
success.subtitle: 6 creators, 6 universes, one thing in common: they found their audience on ImuChat.
success.creator1Quote: ImuChat changed my life. I earn more than at my old job while doing what I love.
success.creator1Tip: Post regularly, even short content. Consistency beats everything.
success.creator2Quote: My premium subscribers fund my art. It's absolute creative freedom.
success.creator2Tip: Show your creative process. People love seeing behind the scenes.
success.creator3Quote: Live gifts are incredible. My viewers are super generous on ImuChat.
success.creator3Tip: Interact with your chat. Community is everything in gaming.
success.creator4Quote: Finally a platform where educational content is valued as much as entertainment.
success.creator4Tip: Make complex topics accessible. Simplifying is an art.
success.creator5Quote: I sell my beats directly in the store. No intermediary, direct revenue.
success.creator5Tip: Diversify: tutorials + beat sales + subscriptions = stability.
success.creator6Quote: Automatic AI translation lets me reach audiences worldwide.
success.creator6Tip: Tell stories, not just places. Humanity connects.

apply.title: Join the Creator Program
apply.subtitle: 4 levels for all creators, from beginner to star.
apply.tier1Desc: Access to basic tools and monetization via tips.
apply.tier2Desc: Unlock subscriptions and the creator store.
apply.tier3Desc: Full access, live streaming and dedicated support.
apply.tier4Desc: The ultimate level with exclusive perks and custom contract.
apply.formMotivationPlaceholder: Tell us about your creative project and why ImuChat...

faq.title: Creator FAQ
faq.subtitle: All the answers to your questions.
faq.q1: How do I join the creator program?
faq.a1: Fill out the form on the /apply page. We will review your application within 48h. All levels are accessible, even without an existing audience.
faq.q2: Are there minimum criteria to sign up?
faq.a2: No! The Starter level is open to everyone. Create your ImuChat account and start publishing today.
faq.q3: How do I move from one level to the next?
faq.a3: Levels are assigned automatically based on your subscriber count. Reach the threshold and your status will be updated within 24h.
faq.q4: Can I be a creator on other platforms at the same time?
faq.a4: Absolutely! ImuChat requires no exclusivity. Continue on YouTube, TikTok or Twitch while growing your presence on ImuChat.
faq.q5: When do I receive my payments?
faq.a5: Payments are weekly. Every Monday for the previous week's revenue.
faq.q6: What is the minimum amount for a bank transfer?
faq.a6: 10€ for a bank transfer or 100 ImuCoins for an ImuCoins payment.
faq.q7: How do I convert ImuCoins to euros?
faq.a7: In your ImuChat wallet, you can convert your ImuCoins to euros at any time. Rate: 1 ImuCoin = €0.10.
faq.a8: Yes, like any income. We provide an annual summary of your earnings for your tax return.
faq.q9: How do I use the built-in video editor?
faq.a9: The video editor is accessible from the + button in the app. You can cut, assemble, add transitions and effects directly from your phone.
faq.q10: Do automatic subtitles work in English?
faq.a10: Yes! Automatic subtitles support 40+ languages including English, French, Japanese, Spanish and many more.
faq.q11: Can I use commercial music in my videos?
faq.a11: ImuChat has a royalty-free music library. For commercial music, you must have the necessary rights.
faq.q12: How do I report a copyright violation?
faq.a12: Use the 'Report' button on any content, then select 'Copyright violation'. Our team processes reports within 24h.
faq.q13: Do I keep ownership of my content?
faq.a13: Absolutely. You retain all rights to your content. ImuChat only has a license to distribute your content on the platform.
faq.a14: Yes, at any time. Deletion is immediate and permanent.
faq.q15: What happens if someone copies my content?
faq.a15: Our automatic detection system identifies duplicate content. Report any copy and we will intervene quickly.

legal.title: Creator Terms of Service
legal.subtitle: General terms of use for ImuChat content creators.
legal.section1Content: You retain full rights to your content. By publishing on ImuChat, you grant ImuChat SAS a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to distribute, display and promote your content on the platform. This license ends when you delete your content.
legal.section2Content: To access monetization, you must: (a) have a verified ImuChat account, (b) reside in a supported country, (c) comply with our content rules. Revenue is calculated according to the displayed rates and paid weekly. ImuChat reserves the right to modify rates with 30 days' notice.
legal.section3Content: Prohibited content: (a) illegal or pornographic content, (b) incitement to hatred or violence, (c) harassment, (d) copyright violations, (e) spam or misleading content, (f) content endangering minors. Any content violating these rules will be removed and may result in account termination.
legal.section4Content: You may terminate your creator account at any time from settings. ImuChat may suspend or terminate your account for violations of these Terms. Upon termination, your accumulated revenue will be paid within the following 30 days, subject to the minimum payment.
legal.section5Content: ImuChat may amend these Terms. You will be notified 30 days before any significant change. Continued use of the creator program after notification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
legal.section6Content: These Terms are governed by French law. Any dispute will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of Paris courts.

footer.tagline: The creator platform that puts you first.
